case_title: MIGUEL A. CASTILLO VS. 860 RESTAURANT A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MIGUEL A.
